strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple domains
Proven ability to own end-to-end systems, from backend APIs to UI and DevOps tooling
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills demonstrated through workshops and public projects
concerns: Job titles (e.g., Staff/Senior) suggest experience beyond junior/mid-level, risking misalignment with role seniority
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS services listed as preferred in job description
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep, diverse fullstack expertise in TypeScript and modern web architectures, with clear alignment to the platform-building and integration needs of the role; however, his senior-level titles and limited German proficiency raise questions about cultural and logistical fit, while missing explicit experience with preferred technologies like PostgreSQL and Nest.js introduces some risk.
